purpose: Offline release-stack archive for completed and previous PR chains. It records branch order, PR/check metadata, and local gates without storing GitHub tokens, job logs, annotations, artifacts, source text, or live check payloads.

after_each_merge: confirm the next stacked PR base is still current
confirm required GitHub checks are green
